problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
hypothesis: If Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction is applied to neural, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
